coherence_notes: Expected breast-TME compartments are all represented: epithelial tumor (Tumor); myoepithelial (Myoepithelial); fibroblast/stroma (Stromal); endothelial (Endothelial); immune (Macrophages, T_Cells, B_Cells, Dendritic, Mast_Cells). The immune compartment in particular is well populated (macrophages, T, B, dendritic, mast).
Proportions are plausible for a breast tumour: the largest cluster is c1 Tumor at 62,755 cells, and the rarest is c9 Mast_Cells at 167 cells (a rare, small population as expected).

No redundancy: all 9 clusters carry distinct cell types (Tumor, Stromal, Macrophages, Myoepithelial, T_Cells, B_Cells, Endothelial, Dendritic, Mast_Cells); no two clusters collapse onto the same call.

refinements.rationale: these markers are plasmacytoid-DC-specific; the subtype is only clear across the whole immune compartment
